description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CMake that runs on every push. Use a matrix strategy to build and test on windows-latest, ubuntu-latest, and macos-11.0 in parallel. For each platform, install dependencies, get the latest CMake, check out the code, configure, build, test, and validate the plugin using pluginval. Upload the build artifacts. Additionally, create a release when a tag is pushed and upload the build artifacts to the release.
